name: edge-control
description: Local Edge browser control for Codex through a localhost bridge, an Edge extension, and direct MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the local Edge browser with DOM and CDP-level access instead of screenshots
interface.longDescription: Edge Control gives Codex a local browser-control surface backed by an unpacked Edge extension, a localhost bridge, and MCP tools for tab control, DOM operations, arbitrary page evaluation, and direct Chrome DevTools Protocol commands.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current Edge tabs and operate the page directly through Edge Control instead of screenshots
Use Edge Control to navigate, click, type, and evaluate page state in my current Edge session
Use Edge Control CDP commands when normal DOM actions are insufficient
